properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Mercy's door is open wide today Jesus said there is no other way You can come and live forever Serve Him while you may Don't let that door of mercy close on you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Don't let that door of mercy close on you, Don't let that door of mercy close on you, Time is swiftly passing, life will soon be through, Don't let that door of mercy close on you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you're walking daily by His side In the rock of ages you may hide What an awful feeling, To be standing there outside And let that door of mercy close on you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When you face that judgement day my friend, Will you hear Him say come enter in? Or depart from Him forever You've lived your life in sin And let that door of mercy close on you.
